data.content: 1. Acceptance criteria failure: src/lib/agent-token-usage.ts still fans one turn.completed usage payload out to every beatId it receives, so persisted token_usage records are not truly beat-scoped when the caller provides multiple beats. 2. The violating multi-beat call path remains active in src/lib/terminal-manager-initial-child.ts, which passes prepared.waveBeatIds for parent-scoped sessions into wireStdout/processStdoutLine and then into logTokenUsageForEvent. 3. Existing tests pass, but coverage is misaligned with the requirement: src/lib/__tests__/agent-token-usage.test.ts asserts the duplicated multi-beat behavior instead of rejecting or skipping it, so the regression is currently codified rather than prevented.
